preview_rows.explanation: Address value is copied from the local draft preview plan fixture for reviewer inspection only.
preview_rows.confirmation_checkpoint: Confirm the address exactly matches the locally reviewed draft before any submission workflow.
preview_rows.rollback_note: Delete the generated row and keep the source fixture unchanged if address evidence is disputed.

preview_rows.explanation: Work description is fixture-backed and is not extracted from a private document or live PDF.

preview_rows.rollback_note: Revert to the prior fixture packet if the reviewer rejects the wording.
